title: Goal
description: A Goal object representing an objective with trackable key results.

id.description: The unique identifier of the Goal.

date_created.description: Unix timestamp when the Goal was created.

start_date.description: Unix timestamp for the Goal start date.

due_date.description: Unix timestamp for the Goal due date.

creator.description: The user ID of the Goal creator.

color.description: The hex color code of the Goal.

pretty_id.description: The human-readable ID of the Goal.

multiple_owners.description: Whether the Goal has multiple owners.

folder_id.description: The Goal Folder ID, if the Goal is in a folder.

key_results.description: Key Results (targets) associated with the Goal.

percent_completed.description: The overall completion percentage of the Goal.

history.description: History of changes to the Goal.

pretty_url.description: The URL to the Goal in the ClickUp web application.
